memory.summary: They're asking for lunch, but I need to finish the assignment analysis first. Socializing can wait until the work is done.
My 'locking in' message to cohort_3 was a hard boundary; they can wait while I crush this analysis. The stress is real, but the deadline is non-negotiable.
I pushed through the analysis block, hitting 58% progress despite my fatigue. Now that I've cleared this hurdle, I can finally join cohort_3 for lunch.
I pushed the analysis to 72% but have less than an hour left; I need to sprint to finish before the deadline hits.
I missed the deadline despite 76% progress; my short-term focus on speed over completion cost me. Now I'm stressed and drained, but I'll just reset for the next sprint.
I finally pushed the analysis to 84%, but my energy is critically low. I need to stop and rest immediately before I crash completely.
I dragged the analysis to 89%, but missing that reading deadline was a stupid mistake. I'm running on fumes and stress, so I need to stop pushing now.
I pushed the analysis to 93% in one last sprint, but my energy is practically gone. That trade-off was worth it for the grade, even if I'm completely drained.
I squeezed out two more percentage points before my energy hit zero. The grade is nearly perfect, but I'm running on pure adrenaline and debt now.
I squeezed out one more point to hit 96%, but my energy is now at zero. The grade is secure, even if I'm completely drained.
Another 0.5 hours pushed me to 98%, but my energy is officially at zero. I traded my entire battery for two more points, and honestly, that's exactly what this grade was worth.
I squeezed out the final 0.98 to 0.99 with zero energy left, but the assignment is finally done. My battery is dead and debt is high, yet I secured the perfect grade.

desires: Secure a perfect grade on the assignment regardless of my physical state, as the outcome is the only metric that matters right now.

Eliminate any social obligations or interruptions from friends until I have recovered enough energy to function again.

goals.rationale: I will execute this only after securing the submission. My assertiveness (8) requires me to renegotiate boundaries directly rather than fail the reading. However, the short planning horizon dictates I finish the 'hard' task first to avoid the anxiety of pending deadlines.

goals.rationale: Future health (0.13) and current relationships are secondary to the immediate victory of the grade. My low sleep discipline (3) and high risk tolerance mean I will crash now rather than push further, effectively cutting off friends to preserve energy for the next cycle.
